pkgmetadata.longdescription: onnxruntime-gpu is the CUDA-enabled build of ONNX Runtime. The wheels are prebuilt per (python_target, x86_64) and bundle the CUDA / TensorRT / cuDNN execution providers; no local compilation occurs. Pairs with dev-python/nvidia-cublas-cu12 and dev-python/nvidia-cudnn-cu12 for the GPU runtime.
